analysis.btc_price_note: BTC ~$78,900 as of Apr 27 ~12:30 UTC (+2.04% in 24h). Range $77,595-$79,400. Approaching $80,000 psychological resistance. Support $77,500 / $75,900.

6 consecutive days of positive net BTC spot ETF inflows — hundreds of millions USD fresh capital

Goldman Sachs Bitcoin ETF SEC filing active (acquired Innovator Capital Management Apr 2)
Morgan Stanley filed for spot BTC ETF — major institutional structural demand
Institutional accumulation ongoing; BTC approaching $80K resistance not yet broken

Mar 2026 CPI 3.3% YoY (hot) + NFP 178K (strong) — no near-term cut pressure on risk assets

analysis.macro_backdrop: No CPI/PPI/NFP in next 24h. FOMC Apr 28-29 (day 1 tomorrow) — rate hold near-certain, muted impact expected. No PCE/GDP until Apr 30. ETF flow data mid-session key catalyst. Geopolitical risk reduced vs prior week. Regulatory clarity improving (SEC CLARITY Act roundtable Apr 28).
analysis.regime_rationale: Bullish (0.65): BTC rallied from $75K low to $79K over 6 days, +2% in 24h, approaching $80K. Fear & Greed recovering from Fear to Neutral. ETF inflows 6 consecutive days. Institutional (Goldman, Morgan Stanley) ETF filings add structural demand. FOMC hold near-certain — no rate shock risk this cycle. Confidence 0.65 >= 0.50 threshold — macro filter ACTIVE. Regime=bullish. Risk: $80K resistance may reject, FOMC hawkish tone possible.
